ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the business sector (e.g., Agriculture, Manufacturing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector's characteristics */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector (e.g., AG for Agriculture) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* The type of sector (e.g., Primary, Secondary, Tertiary) */,
  "sector_size" TEXT /* The size of the sector in terms of market value or number of employees */,
  "sector_growth_rate" TEXT /* The annual growth rate of the sector */,
  "sector_risk_profile" TEXT /* A brief description of the typical risk profile for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector being analyzed */,
  "sales_reduction" TEXT /* Percentage of sales reduction due to disruptions */,
  "supply_disruption" TEXT /* Percentage disruption of supply of inputs or raw materials */,
  "cash_flow_shortages" TEXT /* Percentage of cash flow shortages reported */,
  "credit_access_reduction" TEXT /* Percentage reduction in access to credit */,
  "workforce_reduction" TEXT /* Percentage of workforce reduction due to layoffs */,
  "insolvency_filings" TEXT /* Percentage of filings for insolvency or bankruptcy */,
  "payment_difficulty" TEXT /* Percentage of difficulty in making payments on loans and other business credits */,
  "disruption_type" TEXT /* The type of disruption (e.g., natural disaster, economic downturn) */,
  "disruption_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the disruption began */,
  "disruption_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the disruption ended */,
  "mitigation_strategies" TEXT /* Summary of suggested mitigation strategies */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to recover from the disruption */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_analysis_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, consultant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location (e.g., office, remote) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the impact analysis entry related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the downloadable report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, ad-hoc) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* The date the report was approved */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES impact_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
